title: Battery for Dyson V10 SV12, LONGFIT 6500mAh Battery Compatible with Dyson Cyclone V10 Animal V10 Absolute V10 Fluffy V10 Motorhead V10 Total Clean Vacuum Cleaner
features: 【PERFECT COMPATIBILITY】100% compatible with all Dyson V10 (SV12) vacuum cleaners including V10 Animal, V10 Absolute, V10 Fluffy, V10 Motorhead, V10 Total Clean and other cordless models. Batteries 969352-02, 20634 etc. Perfectly fits Dyson V10 wall chargers and original brackets.
【HIGH PERFORMANCE REPLACEMENT BATTERY FOR DYSON V10】Capacity: 6500mAh. High quality Li-ion battery, ideal for Dyson V10 vacuum cleaners. No memory effect, longer service life than original batteries.

【SMART AND SAFE PROTECTION OF BATTERY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM】Equipped with multiple built-in protection systems to prevent short circuits caused by overcharging, overheating, over voltage, over current and over discharge, thus extending the battery life. 1000 times tested by a battery manufacturer with 18 years of experience.

【6 STEPS EASY INSTALLATION】With the same design and functions, it only takes 6 steps to replace the original Dyson battery. Virtually no self-discharge. Simply with a screwdriver, it is possible to replace and install the new battery of the V10 vacuum cleaner.

【365 DAYS WARRANTY & LIFETIME AFTER SALE SERVICE】LONGFIT guarantees its products with 365 days warranty and lifetime after-sales service. Our commitment is to provide reliable products and ensure your complete satisfaction. Customer service on Amazon or info@elongfit.com.
description: Product Description Fits V10 Series Models Only (Please use 'Ctrl + F' to find your Dyson Cyclone V10 Animal LightweightDyson Cyclone V10 Total CleanDyson Cyclone V10 Animal ProDyson Cyclone V10 MotorheadDyson Cyclone V10 AbsoluteDyson Cyclone V10 FluffyDyson 206340, Dyson 969352-02, Dyson SV12 Warm reminder: Please do not start when charging, it will damage the machine. Fully charge the new battery before use.Please do not charge it immediately after the battery runs out, especially the MAX mode used and the battery is hot. let the battery cool for 10-20 minutes, this is very important. You can first use the standard mode in daily use, MAX will shorten the use time.Most of the reasons for intermittent operation of the vacuum cleaner are blocked, please check whether the main unit, long rod and tip are blocked or not, and clean it or replace the filter.Do not leave the battery idle for long periods, we recommend using the battery at least once every two to three weeks. Lithium has a phenomenon nomene of self-discharge. Long-term storage will cause excessive battery discharge and damage the internal structure of the battery, reducing battery life. Therefore, long-term storage of lithium batteries should be recharged every 2-3 months. Lithium batteries should be fully charged and stored, and stored in a low temperature environment (3℃~20℃), dry and well ventilated. What you get 1 x V10 replacement battery + 1 x battery cover + 1 x manual + 4 x screws

specifications_table.Box Contents: 1 x clean brush, Screws, V10 Battery *1
